name: Dr. Pepper Chocolate Yum Yums
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and beat until incorporated.
3. Blend in the melted bitter chocolate.
4. Sift together the flour and salt, then add to the mixture alternately with Dr. Pepper, starting with the flour, followed by Dr. Pepper, and ending with the remaining flour. Mix slowly.
5. Stir in the vanilla and chopped walnuts until well combined.
6. Spread the dough on wax paper.
7. Form into 2-inch rolls and wrap in foil.
8. Refrigerate until ready to bake.
9. Slice to desired thickness, place on a baking sheet, and bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until browned.
